title: Mr. Thyme's Trident Tweaks
description: rebalances tridents and changes methods of obtaining them
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-X21CavLCvQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Mr. Thyme's Trident Trident Tweaks gives tridents more combat potential, and gives tham a more interesting route to be obtained via ocean monuments. this also rebalances loot for turtle and nautilus shells.
